title: Supervisor Comments on Your Thesis? Diagnose Before You Rewrite
excerpt: A practical, ethical guide for students who receive supervisor comments on a thesis and need to diagnose, revise, and resubmit without damaging the research logic.

title: Chapter 4 Looks Weak? The Problem May Not Be Your Data — It May Be Your Interpretation
excerpt: Many students have tables, outputs, and statistical results, but still receive comments that Chapter 4 is weak. The real issue is often not the data itself, but how the results are selected, reported, interpreted, and connected to the research questions.
